name_en: Museum of the Sea and Ecology
name_local: Musée de la Mer et de l'Écologie

phrases.text_local: Deux billets pour adultes, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: duh bee-YAY poor ah-DULT seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is housed in a historic building on the Grande Rue. Entry is separate from the abbey ticket. Combination passes are sometimes available — ask at the desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the bay ecosystem exhibit
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'exposition sur l'écosystème de la baie ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lex-poh-zee-SYOHN soor lay-koh-sees-TEM duh lah BAY
phrases.cultural_note: The bay of Mont Saint-Michel is a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of France's most ecologically sensitive areas. The museum explains tidal dynamics, migratory birds, and sheep grazing on the salt marshes.

responses.english: At the back, in the second room.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN dahn lah duh-ZYEM SAHL
responses.local: Au fond, dans la deuxième salle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the pré-salé sheep display
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'expliquer l'élevage des moutons de pré-salé ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO mex-plee-KAY lay-luh-VAHJ day moo-TOHN duh pray-sah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: Salt-marsh lamb (agneau de pré-salé) from the bay is a celebrated local delicacy with AOC protection. The sheep graze on salt-rich grasses that give the meat a distinctive flavour.

responses.english: It is in the ground floor room.
responses.phonetic: say dahn lah SAHL doo ray-duh-shoh-SAY
responses.local: C'est dans la salle du rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum has exhibits in English
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des panneaux explicatifs en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah day pah-NOH ex-plee-kah-TEEF ahn ahn-GLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Many Norman museums offer bilingual French–English panels, especially in attractions frequently visited by international tourists.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long a visit typically takes
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure la visite en moyenne ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohm-BYAHN duh tahn DOOR lah vee-ZEET ahn mwah-YEN
phrases.cultural_note: A thorough visit takes about 45 minutes to an hour. Given the proximity to the abbey, most visitors combine both on the same day — plan accordingly around the tide schedule.
